title: Before you start
intro: FeralSpotter captures the following at the moment you take a photo, and uploads it when you submit a sighting:

items.label: Photos
items.text: captured when you take them of the animal

items.label: Location
items.text: (GPS) captured at the moment you take a photo

items.label: Details you enter
items.text: about the animal (appearance, condition, etc.), captured when you submit

items.label: Your Google account
items.text: so we can follow up if a submission needs clarification

items.label: Anonymous usage analytics
items.text: such as app events and crash data, to help us improve FeralSpotter

body: This data is uploaded to a private cloud storage bucket and used to build a dataset for feral cat population tracking and research. It is not made public and is not shared outside this project.
By continuing, you agree to photos and location being captured when you take a photo, and to all of this data being uploaded and analytics being collected as described above.
